      Pair.map Rat.cast conts

K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : LinearOrderedField K
inst✝ : FloorRing K
v : K
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ conts,
    (match n with
      | 0 => { a := 1, b := 0 }
      | 1 =>
        {
          a :=
            (match IntFractPair.seq1 v with
              | (h, s) => { h := ↑h.b, s := Stream'.Seq.map (fun p => { a := 1, b := ↑p.b }) s }).h,
          b := 1 }
      | n.succ.succ =>
        match
          (match IntFractPair.seq1 v with
                | (h, s) => { h := ↑h.b, s := Stream'.Seq.map (fun p => { a := 1, b := ↑p.b }) s }).s.get?
            n with
        | none =>
          (match IntFractPair.seq1 v with
              | (h, s) => { h := ↑h.b, s := Stream'.Seq.map (fun p => { a := 1, b := ↑p.b }) s }).continuantsAux
            (n + 1)
        | some gp =>
          nextContinuants gp.a gp.b
            ((match IntFractPair.seq1 v with
                | (h, s) => { h := ↑h.b, s := Stream'.Seq.map (fun p => { a := 1, b := ↑p.b }) s }).continuantsAux
              n)
            ((match IntFractPair.seq1 v with
                | (h, s) => { h := ↑h.b, s := Stream'.Seq.map (fun p => { a := 1, b := ↑p.b }) s }).continuantsAux
              (n + 1))) =
      Pair.map Rat.cast conts
